welcome back to the channel today we're looking at FocusKit an app built by solo founder Maya Chen it's a pomodoro timer for remote teams in the productivity space and she says it's now doing $40k MRR which is wild considering she launched it on Product Hunt just last year we'll also touch on InvoiceOwl a small invoicing tool for freelance designers the founder mentioned on Indie Hackers that it makes about seven figures a year total revenue anyway let's dive into how Maya grew FocusKit mostly through SEO and TikTok clips
